welcome_offer.description: Earn 70,000 World of Hyatt bonus points after spending $7,000 on purchases within the first 3 months of account opening.
notes: Official Chase/Hyatt issuer evidence shows the current public business-card offer as 70k after $7k/3mo.
Hyatt issuer page/search result states the 70k business offer ends August 20, 2026.

welcome_offer: sources/*issuer-chase*.md:after you spend $7,000 on purchases within the first 3 months

open_questions: Monitor after 2026-08-20 to confirm whether Chase/Hyatt revert to the prior 60k/$5k standard offer.

community.summary: Current issuer and secondary sources support the World of Hyatt Business elevated public 70k after $7k/3mo offer, ending 2026-08-20 per Hyatt issuer page/searchable evidence.

observations.source: Chase / World of Hyatt credit-card page
observations.excerpt: Issuer page describes 70,000 bonus points after $7,000 in purchases within the first 3 months.

observations.source: Hyatt World of Hyatt credit-card page
observations.excerpt: Hyatt page/searchable issuer evidence states the 70k business offer ends August 20, 2026.

observations.source: One Mile at a Time / frequent-miler / DoC current-offer reports
observations.excerpt: Multiple secondary sources reported the Chase Hyatt Business offer increase to 70k/$7k in mid-July 2026.
